transcript.text:
I've been told they're serious about chicken
[Everything has chicken...]
[Let me show you what I'm serious about...]
[Okay you can stop now...]
[A fast casual chicken restaurant]
[Chick by Chick]
[We're doomed...]
Does she really eat everything?
[Yes]
[Some rosé sauce with chicken]
[I'm pretty serious about eating]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Seon Reung today
I've been told they're serious about chicken
I'm hungry This is going to be great
[Chick by Chick] [Seon Reung location]

Everything on their menu has chicken That's how serious they are
There it is
#1 restaurant from the delivery app Bae Min
I'm curious Let's head inside
Hello
[Order from the kiosk]
Everything is chicken Chicken chicken chicken chicken
Regular one (Grilled Chicken Sandwich)
You can take pickles out
I don't like pickles That's convenient
[Get outta here]
Let's make it grilled onions
Avocados chicken sandwich,
Hashbrown chicken sandwich,
Bacon cheese chicken sandwich,
Bacon hash burger,

This one looks crazy
[Avocado king prawn burger]
I heard the chicken rice bowl is good too
Grilled light with fried egg,
King prawn avocado rice bowl,
Chicken pasta, chicken pasta, Chicken pasta
This one looks good Marry me chicken
Done!
About that much?
[This is an emergency]
Is she really eating everything?
This might not be enough
Not enough?
[All ready to go]
[This is really for 1 person?]
She's really eating all of this?

We wouldn't be able to finish that
[That must be like 8~9 servings]
Ta-da It's all ready to go
The ingredients look fresh
This is a fast-casual restaurant where it's like fast food and casual dining Somewhere in the middle
Hello
We grill out chicken with our own oven grill that the company invented So it has a great smokey flavor
You will be able to tell that it's fresh And it'll be a new experience
When you take a bite, you will be like "What is this?"
[Thank you for the kind explanation]
They have their own way of grilling the chicken So I'm excited to find out
Bon appetit What to eat first?
Potato fries I heard they have great fries
That's good
Thick cut fries with crispy outside and soft inside
Really good

The main item first
Which one is which?
This is the avocado sandwich
Bacon cheese here,
Grilled light,
Bacon hash,
This one is regular hashbrown,
Avocado king prawn here
Thank you
This is the regular chicken sandwich Let's eat this one first
Lettuce, tomato, onions, chicken
I like this way more than fried chicken
So good
It's a gem
The sauce is so good
I don't really enjoy eating mayo

I prefer bulgogi sauce
This sauce is creamy and has a kick to it It's great
And their chicken too
Yummy
Really juicy and tender I can taste the skin too
Cooked really well
Tasty
I've only had fried chicken sandwiches
For me, grilled chicken tastes so much better than fried chicken
It's not too heavy either For those who are on a diet
[40% less calories]
I like how it's not greasy And it has a clean taste
Bacon cheese
This has grilled onions
Just like that
You get to choose raw onions or grilled onions

These are getting bigger
The buns are very soft too
Tasty
High quality
Chicken tastes so good
You can feel the texture better because it's not fried
And also the skin
I love it
It's a little thicker because of the bacon and cheese
I like it
The fact that you can taste the chicken skin from a chicken sandwich
Why did it have to be bacon & cheese and not lettuce?
I get excited when I see the soda machine
The rice bowl is popular too
It's chicken and veggies over rice
Get a good scoop

First time trying this rice bowl
How's their rice so good?
The rice is amazing
[Getting ready...]
Did you try our rice?
Yes I just had it
We have our own way of making the rice with butter, garlic, and chicken stock powder
It will not taste like your everyday rice
Right, I was surprised at how good it was
-Enjoy -Thank you
[Mission accomplished]
[They're serious about their rice too]
Scoop the avocado like this
Just like that
This is no joke
That's so good

I ordered 2 different types of rice bowls
But they have 4 total
Avocado on top
Mushrooms too
I feel like this is great for people on a diet
Although I've never been on a diet
Feels healthy
Prawn too
The rice is great
I can eat broccolis
Paprika is good
I'm so good at eating veggies I'm not the same
Avocado sandwich
There are a lot of burgers with avocado these days It's my first time
It's good The avocado is refreshing
It's not sliced, it's smashed So it's easier to eat

Avocado goes well with chicken
It feels healthy and it tastes good
This is chicken with rosé sauce
Is this similar to a hamburger patty?
What to do?
Chicken's so good
This is a chicken restaurant
It's so juicy maybe because of how they grill it
So meaty and juicy
It's delicious
You can order the buns on the side
Rosé chicken sandwich
This is going to be great
Rosé sauce has some spiciness And gets all the greasiness out
This can be added on the menu Looks good
[Finished]

[Stop]
It tastes better if you add fries in there
Thank you
[Call me when you need me...]
Some fries on top
It looks so good already
Insane
Chicken is crispy
All of the ingredients are so flavorful
Next
Hashbrown I really love these
Tomato, bacon, cheese
Tastes great with hashbrowns
I love the smell of the smokiness from the grill
It's much thicker now from the fried goods
I hate when I'm just left with the buns at the end

So I try to take bites where there's more bread
And I leave everything like the for the final bite
The last bite makes me happy
She had 5 so far...
Are you not full yet?
Nope
How are you feeling?
Just a little bit of food inside
I digest while I eat
Wow, so cool
You can feel it being digested?
I kinda do
I kinda feel the food going down
Enjoy, take your time
[Rest of the King Prawn Avocado Chicken Rice Bowl]
Looks good

Avocados inside
Shrimp patty

Yes, you're right
Thank you
The tails are cut off I love it
Grilled light chicken rice bowl
The rice itself is good
Non-sticky,
With a hint of garlic
Really good
The whole shrimp is really big
This is a real shrimp burger
I can feel the smaller shrimps inside the patty too
[I'm watching you...]

So she can feel comfortable
[Like this]
I had no idea
Fried egg
So pretty
It can get a little uncomfortable when you dine with someone that's on a diet
This place is great for situations like that
It's been sitting here and it's still good
The meat itself is good
This is leg/thigh meat
Dark meat is the best
[Agreed]
Hashbrown chicken sandwich
The sauce is excellent

I should take these home

I drank out of the machine
Most of the food item here has chicken
I think it'd be great if you enjoy eating fresh chicken
So jealous
The fact that all of that doesn't go into fat
1 bite Is it possible?

First off,
